item.title: How to spot fake honey
item.description: Detecting fake honey can be challenging because some counterfeit products are skillfully made to resemble real honey. 46% of the honey samples analyzed are fraudulent With 46% of the samples analyzed being fraudulent, it is safe to say that a significant proportion of the honey consumed in Europe is fake. “With 175,000 tons of honey imported per year, the Old Continent is the world’s second-largest importer of honey after the United States,” source Forbes.
